payload.intent: Live smoke the inline supervisor-owned agentic producer path for agentic-executor-wiring-inline-20260531. Do not edit files. Run the required agentic policy path, produce at least one read-only codebase_audit worker receipt under .handoff/agentic-workers, and verify that P13 accepts runtime_native evidence before the lead synthesis continues.

command:
/lead Agentic worker roster planning. Task id: agentic-executor-live-smoke-20260531. Run id: codex-agentic-executor-live-smoke-20260531-rerun1.
Plan read-only helper workers for Codex to spawn. Do not edit files and do not spawn workers yourself.
Intent:
Live smoke the inline supervisor-owned agentic producer path for agentic-executor-wiring-inline-20260531. Do not edit files. Run the required agentic policy path, produce at least one read-only codebase_audit worker receipt under .handoff/agentic-workers, and verify that P13 accepts runtime_native evidence before the lead synthesis continues.

Minimum workers: 1.
Required roles: codebase_audit.
Maximum per-worker timeout: 900 seconds. Maximum per-worker budget: 100.00 USD.
Return only a short note plus <agentic_worker_roster>{...}</agentic_worker_roster> JSON. The JSON shape is {"workers":[{"worker_id":"audit-1","role":"codebase_audit","persona_id":"reviewer.codebase_audit","permission_mode":"readOnly","tool_pins":["rg","sed"],"prompt":"specific read-only task","timeout_s":300,"budget_usd":1.0}]}.

roster.prompt: Read-only audit for live smoke of inline supervisor-owned agentic producer path (task agentic-executor-wiring-inline-20260531, run codex-agentic-executor-live-smoke-20260531-rerun1). Do NOT edit any files. Verify and report: (1) supervisor/agentic_executor.py exists and exposes the inline fan-out producer used by the supervisor; (2) supervisor/dynamic_workflow_receipts.py imports/calls the agentic_executor producer (rg for agentic_executor symbols and call sites); (3) tests/test_agentic_executor.py exists and covers the inline path; (4) mcp_tools/codex_supervisor_stdio.py exposes/routes the agentic policy path; (5) no stray TODO/FIXME/'NotImplemented' in the four files above. For each item, include file:line evidence from rg/sed. Emit a single receipt file written by the supervisor harness (worker itself is read-only) summarizing pass/fail per check with file:line citations so P13 can accept runtime_native evidence. Return a concise findings block ordered by severity, plus residual risk.

claims: tests passed
focused agentic executor wiring tests passed
tool_receipts.command: uv run pytest tests/test_agentic_executor.py tests/test_agentic_workers.py tests/test_dynamic_workflow_receipts.py tests/test_dual_agent_workflow_driver.py::test_run_dual_agent_workflow_required_policy_spawns_agentic_workers_and_accepts_runtime_native_receipts tests/test_dual_agent_workflow_driver.py::test_run_dual_agent_workflow_allowed_policy_runs_producer_without_blocking_on_missing_receipts tests/test_dual_agent_workflow_driver.py::test_agentic_required_blocks_solo_execution_before_lead tests/test_dual_agent_workflow_driver.py::test_run_dual_agent_workflow_required_policy_still_blocks_without_executor_receipts tests/test_dual_agent_workflow_driver.py::test_submit_workflow_job_payload_round_trips_agentic_policy_fields -q

payload.content:
Supervisor-owned workflow gate: execution.

Intent:
Live smoke the inline supervisor-owned agentic producer path for agentic-executor-wiring-inline-20260531. Do not edit files. Run the required agentic policy path, produce at least one read-only codebase_audit worker receipt under .handoff/agentic-workers, and verify that P13 accepts runtime_native evidence before the lead synthesis continues.

Review this gate against the current source artifacts and return a typed dual_agent_outcome.
Use decisions/objections to say whether the gate should accept, revise, or deny.

claims: audit-1 is a genuine read-only runtime_native codebase_audit receipt (verified via command flags + transcript)
Captured P13 did NOT accept runtime_native evidence; it went RED
Worker fan-out + read-only enforcement + receipt production work end-to-end (proven by audit-1 rerun)
Implementation is not fundamentally broken; failure is flaky planner + uncaptured rerun, so DENY is too strong

criteria: Authoritative event ledger consulted over disk claims
Receipt timestamps cross-checked against P13 event time
Read-only/runtime_native nature of receipt verified from command flags
evidence: No test run this gate (no-edit review). Existing: tests/test_agentic_executor.py (4 tests per audit), tests/test_dual_agent_workflow_driver.py:1983 integration — not executed in-session
REVISE: do not advance — re-run so a single captured run both produces the codebase_audit receipt and records a GREEN P13 over runtime_native evidence
Harden planner against agentic_roster_missing (bounded retry/fallback at agentic_executor.py:246) — flagged follow-up, out of scope for no-edit gate
Confirm P13 acceptance boundary in dynamic_workflow_receipts.py recognizes the codebase_audit receipt
confidence.rationale: Ledger, manifest, triage, outcome-review, and the on-disk receipt timestamps consistently show the captured run blocked with P13 red and the passing receipt produced by a later uncaptured rerun. High confidence the acceptance criterion is unmet; minor residual that an out-of-band P13-green capture exists somewhere I did not find (replay dir contains no such event).

payload.content: Live smoke partially succeeded: a genuine read-only codebase_audit runtime_native receipt (audit-1) was produced, but the captured supervisor ledger shows the primary producer run BLOCKED (agentic_roster_missing, receipt_count 0) and P13 RED (agentic_lead_policy_blocked). The passing receipt came from an uncaptured rerun started after P13 already failed, so P13 never accepted the runtime_native evidence in-ledger. Gate's headline criterion unproven; REVISE.

assumptions_to_verify: No alternate result file captures a P13-green for rerun1 (replay dir shows none)
Planner roster miss is transient/non-deterministic rather than a persistent prompt-format defect
contradictions_checked: On-disk audit-1 status=passed vs ledger produce=blocked/receipt_count 0 — resolved: disk receipt is from run ...-rerun1, post-P13, uncaptured
P13 receipt_count 3 vs required role codebase_audit — the 3 are unrelated pytest/hygiene receipts
Prior memory said wiring is verified complete — consistent: code works, this gate's failure is operational (flaky planner + capture gap), not a wiring defect
missing_evidence: A captured ledger/manifest event showing P13 green over the codebase_audit runtime_native receipt
A single run where produce_agentic_worker_receipts returns passed with the codebase_audit receipt counted
Full pytest suite execution status (not run in-session)
critical_review.strongest_objection: The gate's explicit success criterion — 'verify that P13 accepts runtime_native evidence' — is directly falsified: the only captured P13 event is RED (agentic_lead_policy_blocked) and the producer returned 0 receipts; the passing audit-1 receipt is from an uncaptured rerun started after P13 already failed, so P13 never saw it.
critical_review.what_would_change_my_mind: A captured supervisor event (manifest/ledger) showing P13 status green/accept over the audit-1 codebase_audit runtime_native receipt within a single non-blocked run would flip this to ACCEPT.

evidence_refs.ref: No test run this gate (no-edit review). Existing: tests/test_agentic_executor.py (4 tests per audit), tests/test_dual_agent_workflow_driver.py:1983 integration — not executed in-session

Passing audit-1 receipt is from uncaptured run codex-agentic-executor-live-smoke-20260531-rerun1 (ts 1780342429), after P13 failed (ts 1780342306) — provenance gap

Live planner path is non-deterministic: blocked first run, passed on rerun, no retry on empty roster

specialists.objection: Receipt produced by uncaptured rerun1 after P13 already went red; never validated by P13 in-ledger
